_meta.notes: Goal: empty venue ready for LED screen install + a single human figure for visual scale. The LED itself is rendered LATER by our canvas, so the wall stays dark. Put the person beside the future screen area, close to the same depth plane as the wall/backdrop where the screen will be installed, not in the foreground. The person must stand at a side edge of the central dark installation surface, never in the center. The composited badge in the corner is purely decorative (silhouette icon + '1.75 м рост' label) and intentionally has no separate ruler that could conflict with the in-frame human.
_meta.shared_negative: no LED screen in frame, no white display, no projection screen, no white rectangle, no bright rectangle, no glowing rectangle, no text on walls, no logos, no brand markings, no specific landmarks
